title: Covenant Assembly Manifest
description: Schema for assembly YAML files that define how sections are compiled into editions

title.description: Human-readable title of the assembled edition

subtitle.description: Optional subtitle shown on the PDF cover page

include_status.description: Only include sections with these statuses

register.description: Which register(s) to include. 'both' includes Ritual then Spec per section.

sections.description: Ordered list of section file paths relative to repo root

output.description: Optional output filename stem (without extension) to override the default derived from the assembly filename

groups.description: Optional groupings of sections into named songs or collections, with optional URLs

title.description: Display title for the group or song

url.description: URL to a playable or published version of this group

sections.description: Section IDs belonging to this group
